nasb.text: if indeed you have heard Him and have been taught in Him, just as truth is in Jesus,

esv.text: assuming that you have heard about him and were taught in him, as the truth is in Jesus,

cnv.text: 如果你們聽了他，在他裡面受過教導，

ccb.text: 如果你们听过祂的事，领受了祂的教诲，就是在祂里面的真理，

csbs.text: 如果你们真的听从了他，又照着在耶稣里的真理，在他里面受了教导，
